beats.action: Flakes of gray ash drift. A brute wrenches a metal canister from Renna's hands, spilling a precious drop of clear water onto the parched earth. Renna stands still.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on the hands and faces, showing the struggle and the spilled water.

beats.action: The enforcer tosses the canister onto a cart piled high with scavenged goods. Renna watches it go.
beats.camera: Medium shot, tracking the canister to the cart, then panning back to Renna.

dialogue.text: Don't look too long. They charge extra for staring.

beats.action: Kaelen does not look away. His eyes track the departing cart, noting the limping stride of the lead enforcer and the frayed ropes securing the tribute.
beats.camera: Close-up on Kaelen's eyes, then a quick pan to show his POV on the specific details of the cart and enforcer's limp.

dialogue.text: The brute on the left favors his right knee. The cart's axle is dry and ungreased.

beats.action: Kaelen continues observing the overloaded cart, noting the arrogant lack of rear guards.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen, subtle head tilt, then quick cut to POV of the overloaded cart.

dialogue.text: They carry twice what their beasts can safely pull.

beats.action: Renna turns sharply to Kaelen, exasperated by his observations.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Renna, slight push in.

dialogue.text: Great. You can write a poem about it while we starve. That water was our tribute for the week.

beats.action: Kaelen turns his gaze to the distant outcrop where the local strongman's fortress rises like a jagged tooth. A cold, precise focus settles over his features.
beats.camera: Over-the-shoulder shot from Renna's perspective, showing Kaelen looking towards the fortress, then a quick cut to a wide shot of the fortress.

dialogue.text: To destroy a wall, one does not hammer the stones. One removes the mortar at the base.

beats.action: Kaelen holds his gaze on the fortress, his expression unyielding.
beats.camera: Close-up on Kaelen's face, holding the stare.

dialogue.text: They have left their supply lines entirely exposed to the ash-storms.

beats.action: Renna's eyes widen slightly, watching Kaelen with sudden intensity despite her fear.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Renna, slight zoom on her eyes.

dialogue.text: You're talking about picking a fight with the man who owns this entire valley. He has thirty sworn blades.

beats.action: Kaelen turns his head slightly, meeting Renna's gaze, completely unmoved by her warning.

dialogue.text: Then we shall ensure those thirty blades have nothing to eat, nowhere to sleep, and no reason to remain loyal.

beats.action: Kaelen holds his unwavering gaze, confident in his assessment.

dialogue.text: The strength of this district is a fragile illusion.

beats.action: Renna looks from the departing cart (implied off-screen) to Kaelen's scarred, unreadable face, a sudden, uneasy curiosity masking her resentment.
beats.camera: Medium shot, tracking Renna's gaze from where the cart was to Kaelen's face.
